en: Hey Dallas, what are your plans on March 11th?
Stop by La La Land Cafe, only on Lovers Lane,.
ko: 러버스 레인에 있는 라라랜드 카페에 들러서

en: To get your free Leisure Latte from 11am to 12pm.
We'll be out there, so come hang out.
ko: 우리는 거기 있을 거니까, 놀러 와서

en: And make sure to see reminders of him in theaters March 13th.
Oh, all right, we're going this way.
